0.text: Subpleural consolidation area in the basal segment of the lower lobe of the left lung

1.text: Atypical infiltration area predominantly of ground glass density in the basal segment of the lower lobe of the left lung

2.text: Atypical infiltration area in the form of subpleural nodular consolidation nearby

3.text: Similar findings in the peribronchial area of the upper lobe of the right lung

4.text: Atypical pneumonic infiltration areas in the basal segment of the lower lobe of the left lung

5.text: Atypical pneumonic infiltration areas in the upper lobe of the right lung
